subtitle.label: Subtitle
subtitle.default: How we collect, use and protect your information.

text.label: Description
text.default: We only collect what we need.

default.title: Minimal data
default.text: We only collect what's needed to deliver your order.

default.title: Secure checkout
default.text: Payments are encrypted via trusted providers.

default.title: Never sold
default.text: We do not sell your personal data to third parties.

default.title: 1) Data we collect
default.intro: We collect only the information required to process orders and provide support.

items.text: Email address for delivery and order updates.
Payment data handled by our payment processor — never stored on our servers.
IP address and browser data for fraud prevention.

default.title: 2) How we use your data
default.intro: Your data is used solely to operate the store and support you.

items.text: Deliver digital products instantly after payment.
Send order confirmations and support replies.
We do not send marketing emails without consent.

default.title: 3) Your rights
default.intro: You can request access, correction or deletion of your data.

items.text: Contact support to request a copy of your data.
Account deletion available on request.
We respond to privacy requests within 30 days.

subtitle.label: Subtitle
subtitle.default: Our refund and replacement rules for digital products.

default.title: All sales final
default.text: Digital products cannot be returned once delivered.

default.title: Replacements available
default.text: Faulty products may qualify for a free replacement.

default.title: Contact first
default.text: Reach support before opening a payment dispute.

default.title: 1) Refund eligibility
default.intro: Due to the nature of digital goods, refunds are generally not available.

items.text: No refunds after the product has been delivered.
Accidental purchases are not eligible for refunds.
Duplicate charges will be refunded after verification.

default.title: 2) Replacements
default.intro: If a product doesn't work as described, we may offer a replacement.

items.text: Report the issue within the product warranty window.
Provide your order ID and proof of the issue.
One replacement per order unless otherwise stated.

default.title: 3) Chargebacks
default.intro: Opening a dispute without contacting us first may result in a ban.

items.text: Contact support before initiating a chargeback.
Fraudulent chargebacks lead to permanent account suspension.

subtitle.label: Subtitle
subtitle.default: Purchasing or using our products means you accept the conditions below.

text.label: Description
text.default: All sales are final unless stated otherwise.

default.title: No refunds
default.text: All sales are final unless we say it clearly.

default.title: Product-based warranty
default.text: Each product has its own support window.

default.title: Proof needed
default.text: To replace something, we need evidence.

default.title: 1) Refunds
default.intro: We do not offer refunds on digital products. Please read carefully before purchasing.

items.text: All sales are final.
Chargebacks or payment disputes may result in a permanent ban.
Replacements are only offered when a product fails to deliver as described.
Contact support with your order ID before opening a dispute.

default.title: 2) Warranty & support
default.intro: Support windows vary by product. Check the product page for specific coverage.

items.text: Instant delivery products — support within 24 hours of purchase.
Subscription-based products — warranty until expiry date shown at checkout.
Boost / upgrade services — warranty covers the full purchased period.
Abuse, sharing, or reselling voids all warranty.

default.title: 3) Replacements
default.intro: If something goes wrong, we will help — but we need proof.

items.text: Provide your order ID and a clear description of the issue.
Screenshots or screen recordings may be required.
False claims or repeated abuse will result in account termination.
Replacements are issued at our discretion within the warranty window.
